entries.definition:
and God spared the believers from having to fight.
قَتْلَى qatlā [pl. of pass. part. قَتِيل qatīl] those who are murdered,
those who have been killed (2:178) يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا كُتِبَ عَلَيْكُمُ الْقِصَاصُ
فِي الْقَتْلَى you who believe, fair retribution is prescribed for you in
[cases of] the slain.
entries.definition_english:
and God spared the believers from having to fight.
قَتْلَى qatlā [pl. of pass. part. قَتِيل qatīl] those who are murdered,
those who have been killed (2:178) يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا كُتِبَ عَلَيْكُمُ الْقِصَاصُ
فِي الْقَتْلَى you who believe, fair retribution is prescribed for you in
[cases of] the slain.

entries.definition:
q–th–ʾ cucumbers, cucumber plantation, to grow cucumbers.
Of this root, قِثَّاء qaththāʾ occurs once in the Qur’an.

قِثَّاء qaththāʾ [coll. n.] cucumbers (2:61) فَادْعُ لَنَا رَبَّكَ يُخْرِجْ لَنَا مِمَّا
تُنْبِتُ الْأَرْضُ مِنْ بَقْلِهَا وَقِثَّائِهَا وَفُومِهَا وَعَدَسِهَا وَبَصَلِهَا so invoke your Lord to
bring forth for us out of what the earth grows, of its herbs and its
cucumbers and its garlic and its lentils and its onions.
entries.definition_english:
